title: Guide Labs 推出新型可解释法学硕士
content: 该公司开源了一个包含 80 亿参数的 LLM，Steerling-8B，采用新架构进行训练，旨在使其行为易于解释。
original_title: Guide Labs debuts a new kind of interpretable LLM
original_content: The company open sourced an 8-billion-parameter LLM, Steerling-8B, trained with a new architecture designed to make its actions easily interpretable.

title: 一位 Meta AI 安全研究员表示，OpenClaw 特工在她的收件箱中肆意妄为
content: 一位人工智能安全研究人员发布的病毒式 X 帖子读起来就像讽刺剧。但这实际上是对将任务交给人工智能代理时可能出现问题的警告。
original_title: A Meta AI security researcher said an OpenClaw agent ran amok on her inbox
original_content: The viral X post from an AI security researcher reads like satire. But it's really a word of warning about what can go wrong when handing tasks to an AI agent.

title: Nvidia 与 Meta 的交易标志着计算能力的新时代
content: 科技巨头购买分立芯片的时代已经结束。人工智能公司现在需要 GPU、CPU 以及介于两者之间的一切。
original_title: Nvidia’s Deal With Meta Signals a New Era in Computing Power
original_content: The days of tech giants buying up discrete chips are over. AI companies now need GPUs, CPUs, and everything in between.

title: 对于人工智能，投资者的忠诚度（几乎）已经消失：至少有十几家 OpenAI 风险投资公司现在也支持 Anthropic
content: 虽然一些双重投资者是可以理解的，但另一些则更令人震惊，并表明对长期存在的道德利益冲突规则的漠视。
original_title: With AI, investor loyalty is (almost) dead: At least a dozen OpenAI VCs now also back Anthropic
original_content: While some dual investors are understandable, others were more shocking, and signal the disregard of a longstanding ethical conflict-of-interest rule.

title: 微软有一个新计划来证明什么是真实的，什么是在线人工智能
content: 人工智能驱动的欺骗现在已经渗透到我们的网络生活中。您可能很容易发现一些引人注目的案例，例如白宫官员最近分享了一张明尼苏达州抗议者的经过处理的图片，然后嘲笑那些询问此事的人。其他时候，它会悄悄地溜进社交媒体，
original_title: Microsoft has a new plan to prove what’s real and what’s AI online
original_content: AI-enabled deception now permeates our online lives. There are the high-profile cases you may easily spot, like when White House officials recently shared a manipulated image of a protester in Minnesota and then mocked those asking about it.
